prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-OUTDOOR-BEG-METAL-DETECT-KIT Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Beginners Essential Metal Detectors Portable Kit - 5pc Description: Find amazing treasures wherever you are with this ASR Outdoor Beginners Portable Metal Detecting Kit.

Each metal detecting kit comes with an 11" Nylon utility belt, 8.5 in sand scoop treasure finder, coin probe location digging tool, handheld 14" metal detector with light indicator, all conveniently stored in a black carrying bag.

Treasures won't find themselves. So get out and search for them with the ASR Outdoor Beginners Metal Detector Kit. Search Terms: gold panning kit equipment for adults camping accessories gear essentials supplies gear and equipment hiking gear bags and accessories sports and outdoors gold rush nugget bucket outdoor games and activities metal detecting accessories tools Features: - Metal coin probe and digging tool to better locate detected treasures - 14" hand held metal detector with a light indicator - 8.5 in sand scoop to unearth treasures - 11" utility belt with pockets to use for your findings - Convenient drawstring carrying bag in black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-pc Beginners Metal Detector Portable Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 14 Inch Handheld Detector, Sand Scoop, Probe Tool, Utility Belt, Carrying Bag

openai.title_differentiation: Handheld 14" Detector With Light Indicator, 85" Sand Scoop, Coin Probe Tool, 11" Utility Belt, Carry Bag
